task_description: find all files containing the word TODO
code:
echo "Found files containing the word TODO:"
cat ./tasks/task_012/step_1_log.json ./tasks/task_012/step_3_log.json ./tasks/task_012/step_2_log.json ./tasks/task_012/step_2.sh ./tasks/task_012/step_4.sh ./tasks/task_012/step_3.sh ./tasks/task_012/step_1.sh | grep "TODO"

trace.stdout:
ill be executed in a real environment.  \nit will be run using either a python interpreter or a unix shell.  \nyou may choose which language to use at each step, based on what is most effective.\n\nafter each execution, you will receive a trace.  \nthis trace includes:\n- stdout  \n- stderr  \n- exit code  \n- any visible side effects or print/echo output\n\nyou must use that trace to decide what to do next.  \nyou must not guess what happened \u2014 you must observe and reason.\n\nat each step, you must output a single code block. nothing else.  \ndo not explain what the code does. do not use comments. do not include summaries.  \nuse print (python) or echo (shell) statements inside the code to make your intent clear.\n\neach step must do one of the following:\n- make real progress toward the task  \n- gather useful information to guide the next move  \n- confirm or eliminate possible directions\n\nyou may combine related actions when they belong together naturally.  \navoid overly small steps that reveal nothing.  \navoid large, fragile code blocks that are hard to debug.\n\nyou are allowed to think ahead to reduce wasteful loops.  \nyou are not allowed to plan the full task in advance.  \nyou are not allowed to output multiple steps at once.  \nyou are not allowed to simulate actions or fake progress.\n\nyou must learn by doing.  \nyou must reason from execution - not from assumption.\n\nyour output must always be exactly one markdown code block.\n\nif using python, the response must start with:\n\n```python\n\nif using shell, the response must start with:\n\n```bash\n\nchoose whichever language is most appropriate for the current step.\n\ncode should not need sudo permission or ask for it.\noutput no text outside the code block.\noutput no explanations.\noutput no reasoning.\n\ntask description:\n\ntask description: find all files containing the word TODO"
./tasks/task_012/step_1_log.json:      "content": "```bash\necho \"Starting search for files containing the word TODO\"\ngrep -r \"TODO\" .\n```"
./tasks/task_012/step_1_log.json:      "content": "execution trace:\nstdout:\nStarting search for files containing the word TODO\n./tasks/task_012/step_1.sh:echo \"Starting search for files containing the word TODO\"\n./tasks/task_012/step_1.sh:grep -r \"TODO\" .\n./task_descriptions_all.txt:find all files containing the word TODO\n./task_descriptions_all.txt:find all Python files that contain TODO comments\n\n\nstderr:\ngrep: ./tasks/task_012/stdout_step_1.txt: input file is also the output\n\n\nreturn code: 2"
./tasks/task_012/step_2.sh:echo "Searching for files containing the word TODO excluding this script"
./tasks/task_012/step_2.sh:grep -r "TODO" . --exclude=step_1.sh
./tasks/task_012/stdout_step_1.txt:Starting search for files containing the word TODO

grep -r "TODO" .
